updates.title: Google Launches Ads Advisor and Analytics Advisor (Agentic AI Tools)
updates.summary: Google introduced two AI agents: Ads Advisor proactively manages campaigns, generates keywords and assets from your website context. Analytics Advisor acts as your data analyst, surfacing insights and guiding measurement decisions.
updates.action: Try Ads Advisor for keyword and asset suggestions. Use Analytics Advisor to identify measurement gaps. Available in all English-language accounts.

updates.title: LinkedIn Reserved Ads, AI Ad Variants, and Dynamic Personalization
updates.summary: LinkedIn launched Reserved Ads for guaranteed top-of-feed placement, AI Ad Variants that generate multiple versions from one input, and dynamic ad personalization using profile data (name, job title). Flexible Ad Creation rolling out in early 2026.
updates.action: Test Reserved Ads for high-priority B2B campaigns. Use AI Ad Variants to quickly A/B test messaging at scale.

updates.title: Meta Will Use AI Chat Data for Ad Targeting
updates.summary: Meta updated its privacy policy to use data from user interactions with Meta AI for targeted ads across Facebook, Instagram, and Threads. This gives Meta a new signal layer from AI conversations.
updates.action: Expect richer AI-driven audience signals. No action needed from advertisers, but be aware users may push back publicly.

updates.title: TikTok Ownership Uncertainty: Marketers Brace for 2026 Whiplash
updates.summary: Following the US TikTok ban scare and sale process, marketers entered 2026 cautious about committing ad budgets. Many diversified spend to Reels and YouTube Shorts as contingency.
updates.action: Maintain diversified short-video strategy across TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Do not over-concentrate budget on any single platform.

updates.title: Partnership Ads Hub: Auto-Surface UGC, Affiliate, and Creator Posts
updates.summary: Meta's Partnership Ads Hub now automatically surfaces Instagram UGC, affiliate content, and creator posts that mention your brand. Professional Mode profiles are eligible, and creators can share ad codes instantly.
updates.action: Check Partnership Ads Hub in Ads Manager. Look for organic creator content you can amplify as paid ads.

updates.title: Threads Ads Launch Globally with 400M+ Monthly Users
updates.summary: Ads on Threads launched globally on January 21, 2026. With 400+ million monthly active users, Threads is now a viable placement for both Advantage+ and manual campaigns.
updates.action: Test Threads as a placement in your existing campaigns. Monitor CPM and engagement rates vs Instagram/Facebook placements.

updates.title: Google Opens Ads for Prediction Markets (CFTC-Regulated Only)
updates.summary: Google now permits ads for prediction markets in the US, but only for entities regulated by the CFTC or authorized by the NFA. Effective January 21.
updates.action: Only relevant if you operate a regulated prediction market. All others remain blocked.

updates.title: Call-Only Ads: No New Creation, Full Phase-Out by Feb 2027
updates.summary: Google removed the ability to create new call-only ads. Existing call-only ads continue serving until February 2027 when they stop receiving impressions entirely.
updates.action: Migrate all call-only ads to responsive search ads with call assets now.

updates.title: Google Ads API v23: Channel-Level Reporting for PMax
updates.summary: API v23 released January 28. Introduces channel-level reporting for PMax showing spend distribution across Search, YouTube, Display, Gmail, Discover, and Maps. PMax is no longer a black box.
updates.action: Update your tools to API v23. Pull channel-level reports to see where PMax is spending. Old API v19 stopped working Feb 11.

updates.title: Account-Level Placement Exclusions Activated Across All Campaign Types
updates.summary: Google activated account-level placement exclusions that apply simultaneously across PMax, Demand Gen, YouTube, and Display. No more replicating exclusion lists per campaign.
updates.action: Set up account-level placement exclusions for known low-quality sites. One list now covers all campaign types.

updates.title: Meta: 2026 is the Year AI Drives Performance
updates.summary: Meta published its 2026 vision: AI will drive ad performance through Andromeda (creative-based targeting), Advantage+ automation as default for all objectives, and AI creative tools at scale.
updates.action: Shift creative production to feed Andromeda. Consolidate campaigns into Advantage+. Test AI creative tools (backgrounds, video gen).

updates.title: Universal Music Group Pulls All Tracks from TikTok
updates.summary: UMG removed its entire catalog from TikTok as of February 1 after failing to reach a licensing agreement. This affects any ads using UMG-licensed music.
updates.action: Audit your TikTok ad creative for UMG tracks. Replace with royalty-free or licensed alternatives from TikTok's Commercial Music Library.

updates.title: PMax Channel-Level Reporting Goes Live + Meridian Scenario Planner
updates.summary: PMax channel reporting is now live in the UI (not just API). Separately, Google expanded Meridian with Scenario Planner - a no-code tool to test budget scenarios and view projected ROI in real time.
updates.action: Check PMax channel reports in the UI. Test Meridian Scenario Planner for cross-channel budget planning.

updates.title: Parked Domains Permanently Removed from Search Partner Network
updates.summary: On February 10, Google permanently removed parked domains (AdSense for Domains) from the Search Partner Network. One of the most criticized low-quality inventory sources is gone.
updates.action: Re-evaluate Search Partners performance now that parked domains are removed. Still default to opt-out unless data proves otherwise.

updates.title: Graph API v25.0: Unified Advantage+ API, Old ASC/AAC Deprecated
updates.summary: Graph API v25.0 launched Feb 18 with enhanced async error reporting. Old ASC and AAC APIs are deprecated - all campaigns must migrate to the unified Advantage+ campaign API.
updates.action: If using Meta Marketing API, migrate from ASC/AAC endpoints to unified Advantage+ API before deprecation deadline.

updates.title: Ad Sequencing Rolls Out to Auction Campaigns (14-17x Conversion Lift)
updates.summary: Ad sequencing is no longer reservation-only. Now available for auction campaigns. Early data shows 14-17x conversion lift for controlled 2-3 ad sequences.
updates.action: Test 2-3 ad sequences in auction campaigns. Story arc: problem > solution > proof.

updates.title: HubSpot 2026: Search Is No Longer the Starting Point for Buyer Journeys
updates.summary: HubSpot State of Marketing 2026 (1,500+ marketers) found buyers now move through AI tools, social, creator content, communities, and review sites before reaching a brand website.
updates.action: Map your buyer journey across AI tools, social, review sites, and communities. Invest in presence beyond search.

updates.title: Meta Shifts to Outcome-Based Optimization: Performance Drops Expected
updates.summary: In the first week of March, Meta moved from auction-based placement optimization to outcome-based optimization. The system now predicts downstream conversions rather than optimizing for engagement.
updates.action: Give campaigns 7-10 days before making changes. Compare against CRM data, not platform numbers.

updates.title: PMax Gets Auto AI Voice-Overs on Video Ads (Opt-Out by Mar 20)
updates.summary: Google is auto-enrolling advertisers into an AI voice-over program for PMax video ads. Ads without existing audio get voice enhancement automatically unless you opt out.
updates.action: Check PMax video ads. Opt out before March 20 if you do not want AI voice-overs.

updates.title: Meta Location Fees: Ad Prices Rise in 6 Countries Starting April
updates.summary: Meta adds Location Fees for Digital Service Taxes starting April. Austria 5%, France 3%, Italy 3%, Spain 3%, Turkey 5%, UK 2%.
updates.action: Factor Location Fees into EU/UK budget planning. Adjust CPA targets upward.

updates.title: 5 B2B LinkedIn Ads Tests to Run in 2026
updates.summary: Search Engine Land published a tactical guide: test Document Ads (CPL $38-82 vs $255+ for image), use conversation ads for mid-funnel, try CTV for reach, leverage AI-generated creative variants, and run lead gen with MAX_QUALIFIED_LEAD optimization.
updates.action: Prioritize Document Ads for lead gen. Test MAX_QUALIFIED_LEAD as optimization target. Compare CPL against your current single image ad benchmarks.

updates.title: TikTok New Ownership Rules: First-Party Data Required, AI Endorsements Banned
updates.summary: Under new ownership, TikTok now requires advertisers to use first-party data through Events API, verify business registration, and bans all AI-generated endorsements in ads.
updates.action: Verify business registration in TikTok Ads Manager. Switch to Events API. Remove any AI-generated testimonials from creative.

updates.title: Meta Ad Policy Crackdown: 34% More Rejections in Health/Wellness/Beauty
updates.summary: Meta upgraded multimodal AI enforcement in Q1 2026. New rules on misleading claims, personal attributes, crypto tiers, and diabetes restrictions. Rejection rates spiked 34% in health/wellness/beauty.
updates.action: Audit all health/wellness/beauty ad copy for compliance. Remove before/after language and unsubstantiated claims.

updates.title: Google AI Mode Now Shows Shopping Ads and Sponsored Stores
updates.summary: Google AI Mode (75M+ daily users) now supports shopping ads and sponsored stores inside conversational search. PMax, Shopping, and Search broad match advertisers are automatically eligible.
updates.action: Ensure you run PMax or Shopping with broad match to appear in AI Mode. No separate opt-in needed.

updates.title: Advantage+ Sales Threshold Drops to 25 Conversions/Week
updates.summary: Advantage+ Sales now requires only 25 conversions per week, down from 50. Predictive Budget Allocation reports 8-15% ROAS improvement.
updates.action: Re-evaluate Advantage+ for accounts that previously could not hit the 50 threshold.

updates.title: TikTok NewFronts: 5 New Premium Ad Formats Including Logo Takeover
updates.summary: TikTok unveiled Logo Takeover, Prime Time (3 sequential ads in 15-min window), TopReach (TopView + TopFeed), Pulse Mentions, and Pulse Tastemakers.
updates.action: Consider Logo Takeover or TopReach for product launches. Test Pulse Mentions to appear alongside brand conversations.

updates.title: TikTok Post-Sale: Advertising Questions Remain Despite US Joint Venture
updates.summary: TikTok sealed its US deal but advertisers still face questions: data handling under new ownership, potential ad policy shifts, and whether the platform can regain paused brand budgets.
updates.action: Resume TikTok investment cautiously. Monitor policy changes monthly. Keep contingency budgets on Reels/Shorts.

updates.title: LinkedIn NewFronts: Top Voices 360, CTV via The Trade Desk, Campaign Renaming
updates.summary: LinkedIn announced Top Voices 360 (premium creator sponsorships), a Trade Desk partnership for programmatic CTV ad buying (90% of members watch ad-supported CTV), and renamed Campaign Groups to Campaigns and Campaigns to Ad Sets.
updates.action: Explore Top Voices 360 for B2B thought leadership sponsorships. Test CTV ads via The Trade Desk integration. Update internal docs for the Campaign/Ad Set rename.

updates.title: March Demand Gen Drop: AI Video from Images + Creator Partnerships
updates.summary: Google launched Veo AI video generation from static images for Demand Gen. Creator assets drive 30% conversion lift on YouTube Shorts on average.
updates.action: Test Veo AI video from your best product images. Use creator discovery tool for authentic content.

updates.title: Meta NewFronts: Reels Trend Ads, Creator Discovery, AI Creative Tools
updates.summary: Meta announced ad placements aligned with Reels trends, improved creator partnership discovery, new AI creative tools, and expanded affiliate/in-stream checkout options.
updates.action: Explore Reels trend-aligned placements. Use new creator discovery tools.

updates.title: Google March 2026 Core Update Rolling Out
updates.summary: Google launched its March 2026 core update alongside a spam update. Semrush Sensor reported Very High keyword volatility for nearly the entire month.
updates.action: Do not make reactive SEO changes. Monitor rankings for 2-3 weeks. Focus on content quality and E-E-A-T.

updates.title: WPP Dissolves Holding Company Model: Merges Ogilvy, VML, AKQA
updates.summary: WPP announced Elevate28, consolidating Ogilvy, VML, AKQA, and WPP Media under one structure. Targeting 500M GBP savings by 2028.
updates.action: If working with any WPP agency, expect structural changes. Signals industry shift toward AI-driven operations.

updates.title: TikTok 2026 Rules: Commercial Disclosure Mandatory, Restricted Category Pre-Approvals
updates.summary: Commercial content disclosure is now mandatory for all promotional posts using TikTok's built-in tools. Restricted categories require strict pre-approvals. New Travel Ads solution launched.
updates.action: Ensure all branded content uses TikTok's disclosure tools. Check if your category needs pre-approval.

updates.title: Google Ads Experiments Now Auto-Apply Winning Variants by Default
updates.summary: Google added an auto-apply setting to experiments, enabled by default. Winning test variants roll out to live campaigns without manual review. You pick confidence level (directional, 80%, 85%, or 95%). Only your two chosen success metrics get protected - other metrics can decline unnoticed.
updates.action: Turn off auto-apply for high-spend or complex experiments. Only use it for simple, low-risk tests. Review all metrics manually before applying to critical campaigns.

updates.title: Demand Gen Campaigns Now Require $5/Day Minimum Budget via API
updates.summary: Google enforces a $5 USD daily minimum budget for Demand Gen campaigns created or modified via API (v21+). Existing campaigns below the minimum keep running, but any future budget change triggers the floor. Targets cold-start phase for ML optimization.
updates.action: Check Demand Gen budgets. Any API-managed campaigns below $5/day will error on next edit. Existing campaigns grandfathered until modified.

updates.title: ChatGPT Ads Favor Clarity Over Creativity: 40K+ Placements Analyzed
updates.summary: Adthena analyzed 40,000+ daily ChatGPT ad placements. Average headline: 30 chars, 5 words. Average body: 116 chars, 19 words. Dominant pattern: 'Brand: Benefit' headline. Concrete dollar amounts outperform vague claims. Low-friction offers (free trials) dominate. Tone is calm and conversational, not interruptive.
updates.action: If running ChatGPT ads, lead with brand name + specific benefit. Keep headlines under 30 chars. Use concrete numbers over creative copy. This is a new channel with different rules than Google or Meta.

updates.title: Meta 'Describe Your Audience' AI Targeting: Type a Prompt Instead of Picking Interests
updates.summary: Meta is rolling out a new 'Describe Your Audience' tab in detailed targeting. Advertisers type a natural language description (up to 2,000 chars) of their ideal customer, and AI suggests matching interest/behavior categories. Hovering shows why each interest was matched.
updates.action: Check if the feature is live in your ad sets under Detailed Targeting. Test it alongside traditional interest selection. The AI may surface interests you hadn't considered.

updates.title: LinkedIn Algorithm 2026: Depth of Engagement Over Width of Reach
updates.summary: LinkedIn's 2026 algorithm no longer prioritizes wide reach. It now rewards depth of engagement - meaningful comments, saves, and shares over impressions. Content that sparks conversation in niche professional communities gets amplified.
updates.action: Shift organic and paid strategy from reach metrics to engagement depth. Write for conversation, not views. Niche > broad.

updates.title: AI-Driven Traffic to Retail Sites Up 693% YoY, Ads Entering AI Conversations
updates.summary: AI-driven traffic to US retail websites grew 693% year over year. Ads are now appearing inside AI conversations (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Mode), creating an entirely new advertising ecosystem separate from traditional search and social.
updates.action: Monitor AI referral traffic in GA4. Ensure product/brand data is structured for AI citation. This is the biggest channel shift since social ads.

updates.title: US Influencer Economy Projected to Hit $44B by End of 2026
updates.summary: The Association of National Advertisers reports the US influencer economy will reach nearly $44 billion by year-end 2026. Growing calls for pay transparency and standardized measurement across platforms.
updates.action: Factor influencer marketing into media mix planning. Push for transparent CPM/CPA benchmarks from creator partners.

updates.title: Google Adds Channel Performance Timeline View to Performance Max
updates.summary: Google launched a channel performance timeline view inside Performance Max that shows how Search, YouTube, Display, and other channels contribute to results over time. New investment and performance filters let advertisers spot underperforming channels and rebalance budget.
updates.action: Open any Performance Max campaign and switch to the new channel timeline view. Look for channels eating budget but underdelivering. Use this to push Google for asset-group adjustments or to argue for channel-level guardrails.

updates.title: Amazon Auto-Deducts Ad Costs From Seller Proceeds Starting April 15
updates.summary: Amazon is moving a subset of US advertiser accounts from credit card billing to automatic deduction of ad costs directly from retail sales proceeds, effective April 15. Pay by Invoice (Net 30) and credit cards remain available as alternatives.
updates.action: If you run Amazon Ads in the US, check your billing settings before April 15. Decide whether you want proceeds skimmed automatically or stay on invoice/card for cash flow control.

updates.title: Meta's AI Push Is Reshaping Ad Creation, Buyers Report Mixed Results
updates.summary: Meta is moving aggressively to automate ad creation via Andromeda and Advantage+, with full automation targeted by end of 2026. Media buyers report mixed results and concerns about losing control to 'black-box' systems even as Meta presses forward.
updates.action: Test Advantage+ creative against your manually-built control sets. Track CPA and ROAS side by side. Don't surrender all creative control yet, the automation is uneven.

updates.title: TikTok US Ad Chief Khartoon Weiss Departs Days After NewFronts
updates.summary: Khartoon Weiss, TikTok's North American and global brands and agency lead, announced she will leave the company effective April 9, just days after presenting at TikTok's NewFronts. Her exit continues a pattern of executive turnover in TikTok's ad division over the past two years.
updates.action: If you have a TikTok rep, check whether your account team is changing. Expect roadmap and pricing chatter to slow until the next leader is named.

updates.title: Google Ads Adds 'Results' Tab to Show Real Impact of Recommendations
updates.summary: Google added a Results tab inside the Recommendations feature that shows the incremental impact of automated bidding and budget changes after they're applied. Advertisers can finally check whether a recommendation actually improved performance instead of trusting Google's claim.
updates.action: Before accepting auto-applied recommendations, baseline your account. After applying, open the Results tab and verify the lift was real. Reject recommendations that show flat or negative impact.

updates.title: Google Ads Lets Marketers Reuse AI Text Rules Across Campaigns
updates.summary: Google Ads is rolling out a beta that lets advertisers copy AI text guidelines from existing campaigns and apply them to new ones. The feature reduces rewriting brand rules every time a campaign launches and helps maintain copy consistency at scale.
updates.action: If you run multiple campaigns under one brand, build one master AI text rule set, then clone it across campaigns. Saves hours and prevents drift in tone and disallowed phrases.

updates.title: Google Now Shows Sponsored Ads in the Images Tab on Mobile Search
updates.summary: Google has begun placing sponsored ad units inside the Images tab of mobile search results. Eligible Search and Performance Max campaigns can show without keyword changes, drawing from existing image assets, so advertisers with strong visual creative get the immediate edge.
updates.action: Audit image assets in your top Search and PMax campaigns. Upload more high-quality product/lifestyle images. Visual-first brands should see free incremental impressions on mobile.

updates.title: Google Tests Swipeable Location Carousel in Search Ads
updates.summary: Google is testing an interactive carousel inside search ads that lets users browse and compare nearby business locations directly within the ad unit. Multi-location advertisers gain visibility but also face more in-unit competition.
updates.action: Multi-location brands: confirm location extensions are clean and Business Profile data is accurate everywhere. The carousel will surface whichever locations Google can verify first.

updates.title: Meta Releases Official Google Tag Manager Template for Pixel Setup
updates.summary: Meta launched an official Pixel template inside Google Tag Manager that removes the need for third-party workarounds. The template auto-maps GA4 ecommerce events like purchases and add-to-carts, cutting implementation time and tracking errors.
updates.action: If your Pixel is wired through a custom GTM tag, switch to the official template this week. Cleaner event firing, fewer parity gaps with GA4, less time fixing tracking.

updates.title: Google Rolls Out Onboarding Guide for Universal Commerce Protocol
updates.summary: Google published an onboarding guide for the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) inside Merchant Center, letting merchants integrate checkout directly into AI-driven search experiences and Gemini. This shifts commerce transactions into the search ecosystem itself.
updates.action: Ecommerce brands: review the UCP guide and assess whether your checkout can plug into Gemini-driven shopping. Early adopters will own the AI shopping placements before competitors.

updates.title: Google Launches Centralized Developer Hub for Ads and Measurement
updates.summary: Google introduced a unified Advertising and Measurement Developers Hub, pulling Google Ads API, Google Analytics, AdMob, and Ad Manager docs into one place. The hub consolidates documentation, community channels, and support for technical marketers and dev teams.
updates.action: If your team builds against Google Ads API or GA4, bookmark the new hub. It replaces the scattered doc pages and should save engineers time tracking down API references.

updates.title: 20-30% of Paid Media Spend Is Wasted as CPCs Rise and Budgets Flatten
updates.summary: Account audits show 20-30% of typical paid media spend underperforms while average CPCs continue rising and marketing budgets stay flat. The path to better ROAS is sharper waste detection, funnel-aware budget allocation, and automation paired with human oversight.
updates.action: Run a waste audit on every account this month. Pull search terms, device splits, geo, and dayparting. Cut the bottom 20% by spend that drives no real conversions. Reallocate to proven performers.

updates.title: Marketers Shift Experimental Ad Budgets Away From Meta and Google Toward AI Channels
updates.summary: As performance channels saturate and CPCs climb, marketers are quietly redirecting test-and-learn dollars from Meta and Google toward emerging AI ad surfaces, retail media, and CTV. Economic pressure and AI disruption are pushing brands to diversify before existing channels lose their edge.
updates.action: Carve out 10-15% of your media budget as 'experimental' and split it across ChatGPT ads, Perplexity, retail media networks, and CTV. Treat it as R&D, not performance, and measure incrementality not last-click.

updates.title: Meta's Adaptive Ranking Model Lifts Instagram Ad Conversions +3%, CTR +5%
updates.summary: Meta rolled out an Adaptive Ranking Model on Instagram that processes more engagement signals in real time while reducing system load. Since launching in Q4 2025, Meta reports a +3% lift in ad conversions and +5% lift in CTR.
updates.action: If you run Instagram Reels or Feed ads, expect modest auto-improvement without doing anything. Don't change creative strategy on the strength of this alone, but use it as additional evidence the IG ad system is improving.

updates.title: Retail Media Networks Pitch Beyond Digital Display at IAB NewFronts
updates.summary: Retail media networks like Albertsons Media Collective and Walmart Connect are showing up at IAB NewFronts to pitch full-funnel offerings far beyond digital display. Albertsons highlighted 49.8M loyalty shoppers and a combined offering with Vizio (acquired by Walmart in 2024).
updates.action: If you sell physical product, request a deck from at least one retail media network this month. Their data is closer to the purchase event than any platform you currently buy.

updates.title: Despite Lawsuits and Scrutiny, Advertisers Stay Loyal to Meta and Google
updates.summary: A New Mexico jury ordered Meta to pay $375M for child safety violations and a California jury found both Meta and Google liable for negligence in a $6M verdict. Yet ad spend on these platforms continues at 'almost a shocking level of regularity', with rising AI costs and minor-bans the only real long-term threat.
updates.action: Don't overreact to scandal coverage when planning media. Track regulatory exposure by region (EU and India most active) and have backup plans, but Meta and Google remain dominant for the foreseeable future.

updates.title: Canva Acquires Simtheory and Ortto to Push Into AI and Marketing Automation
updates.summary: Canva announced dual acquisitions of Simtheory and Ortto, framing them as a bet on agentic AI, data infrastructure, marketing automation, and customer engagement. The move pushes Canva from design tool toward an end-to-end marketing platform competing with HubSpot, Klaviyo, and Adobe.
updates.action: If you use Canva at scale, expect deeper marketing automation features in the next 6 months. Watch for native send/email/CRM hooks that may replace current point tools.

updates.title: TikTok Launches Wix Integration for SMB Brands With Pixel + Events API + Catalog Sync
updates.summary: TikTok rolled out a global Wix integration that lets SMB ecommerce brands link their storefront directly into TikTok Ads. Bundles TikTok Pixel, Events API, and product catalog sync. TikTok cites a 19% lift in incremental events and 15% improvement in CPA from early ad partners.
updates.action: If you run a Wix store, install the updated TikTok Ads app from the Wix App Market this week. Wire the Pixel and Events API through the official integration so your tracking is clean before scaling spend.
